parents.notableLifeEvents: Built middle-income housing in Queens and Brooklyn. Founded Elizabeth Trump & Son. Became one of the largest landlords in New York City.
parents.notes: Son of German immigrant Friedrich Trump.

parents.notableLifeEvents: Emigrated from Scotland to New York in 1930. Met Fred Trump at a dance. Active in charity work throughout her life. Naturalized citizen in 1942.
parents.notes: Scottish immigrant. Gaelic speaker in childhood.

grandparents.culturalBackground: Emigrated from Kallstadt, Bavaria, Germany to the United States in 1885
grandparents.memorableStories: Emigrated at age 16, ran restaurants and boarding houses in the Pacific Northwest during the Klondike Gold Rush before settling in New York.

grandparents.culturalBackground: Gaelic-speaking fisherman from the Isle of Lewis, Scotland
grandparents.memorableStories: Worked as a fisherman in the Scottish Outer Hebrides.

siblings.uniqueCharacteristics: Became a federal judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals
siblings.sharedExperiences: Grew up together in Jamaica Estates, Queens

siblings.uniqueCharacteristics: Wanted to be a pilot, worked briefly for Trans World Airlines
siblings.sharedExperiences: Fred Jr. was seven years older. His struggles with alcoholism deeply affected the family.
siblings.notes: Deceased 1981. His death shaped Donald's views on alcohol — Donald has said he does not drink.

siblings.uniqueCharacteristics: Worked as a banker at Chase Manhattan
Worked in real estate and business
siblings.sharedExperiences: Robert worked in the Trump Organization

spouse.narrative: Married in 1977. Ivana was a competitive skier and model from Czechoslovakia. She worked within the Trump Organization, managing the Plaza Hotel and other properties. They had three children together. Divorced in 1992.
Married December 1993. Marla was an actress and TV personality from Georgia. They had one daughter together. Divorced in 1999.
Met at a Fashion Week party in 1998. Married January 2005 at Mar-a-Lago. Melania is a former model from Slovenia who speaks five languages. They have one son together.

marriage.weddingDetails: Married in 1977 at Marble Collegiate Church in Manhattan.
Married December 1993 at the Plaza Hotel in New York City.
Married January 22, 2005, at the Episcopal Church of Bethesda-by-the-Sea in Palm Beach, reception at Mar-a-Lago.

children.notes: Eldest son, from first marriage to Ivana. Business executive.
From first marriage to Ivana. Businesswoman and former White House adviser.
From first marriage to Ivana. Business executive.
From second marriage to Marla Maples.

familyTraditions.description: Holiday gatherings at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida

earlyMemories.firstMemory: Growing up in the Trump family home in Jamaica Estates, Queens, a large Tudor-style house.
earlyMemories.significantEvent: Attending the New York Military Academy at age 13 after behavioral issues at Kew-Forest School.

education.schooling: Kew-Forest School in Forest Hills, Queens. New York Military Academy in Cornwall-on-Hudson from 1959 to 1964.
education.higherEducation: Fordham University for two years, then transferred to the Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania. Graduated 1968 with a BS in Economics.
education.earlyCareer: Joined father Fred Trump's real estate business, Elizabeth Trump & Son, after graduation.
education.careerProgression: Expanded from residential real estate in Brooklyn and Queens to Manhattan development. Built Trump Tower (1983), casinos in Atlantic City, and expanded into branding, media, and politics. Elected 45th President of the United States in 2016.

hobbies.travel: Residences in New York City, Palm Beach, and Bedminster, New Jersey.

health.lifestyleChanges: Does not drink alcohol or smoke. Has attributed this to the impact of his brother Fred Jr.'s death from alcoholism.
